title: People I am indebted to for helping me — gratitude list, April 2025
html:
People I am indebted to for helping me — gratitude list, April 2025

Source: 2025-04-20 Apple Note. Six lines. No commentary. The most efficient relationship-map artifact in the corpus — Yahir naming the exact set of people and organizations he believes lifted him.

TL;DR

A flat list of six debts:

  1. Bored Family Foundation — almost certainly a typo for Ford Family Foundation. Same Oregon scholarship org named in 2024 05 13 things (with Zane as contact). Worth verifying with Yahir but the typo is the reading-of-record.
  2. Chan Taylor — mentor, no further context yet.
  3. Brenda Aguilera — mentor / community connection.
  4. My family — see yahir family.
  5. The Boys and Girls Club — youth org, almost certainly the Grants Pass chapter.
  6. Kim — first-name-only.

This is the ledger Yahir keeps in his head, written down once, on a Sunday in April 2025, two months after the peacock bar incident and a month before he started executing the Austin move logistics in 2025 05 30 todos.

Why this matters for the graph

A gratitude list is a relationship-map cluster in disguise. Two of the six items are scholarship/youth orgs (Ford, Boys & Girls Club) and one is family — meaning half of Yahir's named debts are to institutions that scaffold poor and small-town kids, not individuals. This connects directly to:

  • The debt of gratitude frame as motivational fuel
  • The "be a project youth plus donor" aspiration in 2025 05 30 todos — pay the debt forward
  • His insistence on staying fully self funded for Rankett rather than raising — possibly an extension of the same not-wanting-to-owe-anyone instinct

Quotes (the whole note is the quote)

"Bored Family Foundation / Chan Taylor / Brenda Aguilera / My family / The boys and girls club / Kim"

Open questions

  • Is "Bored Family Foundation" actually Ford (typo) or a different org? Most-likely-typo but worth confirming.
  • Chan Taylor — Grants Pass teacher? Boys-and-Girls-Club staff? OSU professor?
  • Brenda Aguilera — relative? family friend? guidance counselor?
  • Kim — last name? Many possible Kims; needs disambiguation.
  • Why did this note get written on 2025-04-20 specifically? Birthday / anniversary / hard day?

Related

  • ford family foundation
  • boys and girls club
  • yahir family
  • gratitude list
  • debt of gratitude
  • grants pass or
  • 2025 05 30 todos
  • no runway discipline
  • post china limbo — written inside the Jan–Aug 2025 limbo window
